title: Replay UI Period Preset Quick-Select Buttons

implementation_summary.backend_changes: none — backend page_size ceiling le=200 sufficient for multi-fetch

html.location: index.html line ~2047 (card-header for 🗂️ 回放記錄)
html.description: Added flex-wrap:wrap to card-header; inserted rp-preset-btns div with four buttons: 100期, 500期, 1000期, 1500期. Each button has data-preset attribute and data-testid for test targeting.

js_variables.rpPageSize: changed from const to let (allows rpPresetFetch to restore default 50 after preset)
js_variables.rpPresetPeriods: new let variable, 0 = normal paginated mode, N = preset mode

rpBuildHistoryRows.purpose: Extracts row rendering logic from rpQuery to share with rpPresetFetch

rpPresetFetch.strategy: while (allRecords.length < n) loop with page_size=min(200, remaining) per call; slices to n; disables prev/next buttons; shows '前N期 / X筆' in total label

rpQuery.change: inline records.map() render loop replaced with rpBuildHistoryRows(records) call

dom_event_wiring.query_button: resets rpPresetPeriods=0, rpPageSize=50, rpPage=1 before calling rpQuery()

multi_fetch_design.early_termination: loop breaks if batch is empty or allRecords >= total
